LanguageData.ABY_CircleRitual_ReactorSaint_Desc: Consumes one reactor saint sigil, routes a colonist to the circle, and stages a breach-skyfall cocoon that slams into the map edge before rupturing into the Infernal Reactor Saint. This breach is built around ranged pressure, reactor shielding, heat saturation, and a visible arrival cycle instead of an instant pop-in.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleRitual_ReactorSaint_Rewards: • Second full boss tier after the first vertical slice • Drops a saint reactor core, spacer-grade salvage, and high-value residue • Forces anti-artillery spacing and sustained boss pressure management
LanguageData.ABY_CircleRitual_ReactorSaint_SideEffect: • Arrives through a staged breach-skyfall cocoon instead of immediate spawn • Uses a direct reactor volley plus zone-barrage pressure to punish static lines • Runs a real Aegis cycle, saturation field, and escalating phase behavior
LanguageData.ABY_ReactorSaintSummonSuccessDesc: The reactor sigil has taken. A saint-class biomechanical breach has completed its skyfall rupture cycle, and the Infernal Reactor Saint is now crossing into local space.
